_comment: Curated agent-skills catalog for the in-app skills browser. Each entry points at a folder containing a SKILL.md in a public GitHub repo; the app downloads that folder into the skills store on install. This file is bundled into the app (include_str!) AND fetched at runtime from raw.githubusercontent.com/project-362/project-362/main/... so the catalog can grow without an app release. `featured` surfaces a skill in the Recommended row; `apps` are case-insensitive app-name keywords used to rank skills against the user's recent app usage. Keep entries high-signal and verified.

skills.name: PDF
skills.description: Fill, merge, split, and extract text or tables from PDF files.

skills.name: Excel
skills.description: Create, read, and edit Excel spreadsheets — formulas, formatting, and charts.

skills.name: Word
skills.description: Create, read, and edit Word documents with formatting, tables, and images.

skills.name: PowerPoint
skills.description: Build and edit PowerPoint decks — slides, layouts, and speaker notes.

skills.name: MCP Builder
skills.description: Scaffold high-quality MCP servers that expose tools to LLMs.

skills.name: Skill Creator
skills.description: Author, edit, and optimize new SKILL.md skills.

skills.name: Webapp Testing
skills.description: Drive and test local web apps with Playwright — verify UI, capture screenshots.

skills.name: Frontend Design
skills.description: Opinionated guidance for distinctive UI — typography, color, and visual polish.

skills.name: Canvas Design
skills.description: Create poster-quality visual art as .png and .pdf documents.

skills.name: Playwright
skills.description: Automate a real browser from the terminal — navigation, forms, scraping, screenshots.

skills.name: Sentry
skills.description: Inspect Sentry issues and summarize recent production errors via the Sentry CLI.

skills.name: Notion Meeting Intelligence
skills.description: Prepare meeting agendas and pre-reads from Notion context.

skills.name: Security Best Practices
skills.description: Language- and framework-specific security best-practice reviews.

skills.name: Transcribe
skills.description: Transcribe audio to text with optional diarization and speaker hints.
